value: Supported: COST-SUMMARY-001 and CTR-DELAY-001 both state delay_exposure_usd_per_day = 15000.
warnings: PRG-ONSITE-001's 'equipment_onsite_claim': true is directly contradicted by three independent contemporaneous records (SUP-NOT-ARRIVED-001, LOG-STATUS-001, RISK-001) and must be treated as invalid for scheduling, cost, and risk decisions.
No source record supports the claim that installation (A-4200) has commenced or can commence before 2026-07-22; any assertion of 'released to installation' is unsupported and operationally unsafe.
